objective: Build the RAW-style QA confidence milestone: cropped RAW-style fixtures and deterministic regression tests, backend RAW match QA summary metadata, and compact Issues/RAW Match review queue UX with validation.

worktree_notes: Only .venv was untracked before new work began.
backend/engine.py has in-progress backend RAW QA helper edits.
No validation has been run after the in-progress backend edits yet.
repo_instructions: Work small and prefer minimal diffs.
Run python -m compileall backend memory when backend changes.
Run npm run build in frontend/ when frontend changes.
Final response should include changed files, short summary, and tests run.

in_progress_changes.summary: Added RAW-style crop signature, review status normalization, derived needs_review/auto_state/fallback metadata, stale marker, and RAW match QA summary helper methods near the existing RAW style analysis helpers.
remaining: Decorate RAW metadata in bootstrap region serialization.
Add RAW QA issue entries for risky current-page regions.
Add update_region_field handling for raw_review_status, raw_review_note, and rematch_stale_raw_styles.
Mark existing RAW matches stale when region bboxes/crops change.

planned_backend_work: Preserve existing RAW auto-apply and manual style override behavior.
Add analysis_crop_signature to new RAW matches and mark stale when bbox changes.
Expose raw_match_qa through existing bootstrap region metadata, not a broad new service.
Support review_status values: unreviewed, accepted, rejected.
Keep SFX/text-over-art proposal-only and never make SFX auto-render more aggressive.
planned_fixture_work: Add a dedicated small cropped fixture folder under backend/core.
Store cropped PNGs plus JSON metadata, not full pages.
Add fixture categories: plain dialogue, black outline, colored outline, shadow, glow, gradient, noisy/low-contrast background, mixed styles, SFX/text-over-art.
Add deterministic fixture runner tests that feed crops into the existing RAW analysis path without OCR, LLM, or model calls.
Assert behavior bands/effects/reasons/auto state/proposal/fallback/manual pinning rather than exact pixels.
planned_frontend_work: Extend frontend types for RAW QA metadata.
Extend Issues tab into a compact RAW QA jump list with filters.
Rows should show page/region, style summary, confidence/status, downgrade chips, and auto/proposed/fallback label.
Row actions: jump to region, compare RAW/Cleaned/Typeset, apply RAW proposal, reset to auto, mark reviewed.
Add Needs Review badges on region boxes for medium/low/fallback/risky RAW matches.
Add RAW QA summary in status bar: RAW QA: N ok, M review.
